title: pelargonium × lasiocaulon
intro: Pelargonium × lasiocaulon, also known as the Mountain Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species of the geranium genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and flowers, which contain compounds that have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × lasiocaulon include reducing stress and anxiety, aiding in digestion, and providing relief from colds and flu symptoms, due to its expectorant and antiviral properties. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and treat various health conditions.
